text: The em dash is the most beautiful punctuation mark. Visually, it's substantial without being heavy — a confident horizontal line that has weight and dignity on the page. Functionally, it's even more compelling because it does more than almost any other punctuation mark while remaining elegant. The em dash can set off asides with fluidity, create dramatic pauses, introduce lists, clarify statements, or allow thoughts to trail off with mystery. Unlike commas, which feel apologetic, or semicolons, which look fussy, the em dash commits and makes a statement by its presence. It combines visual grace with remarkable flexibility, understanding both the music and meaning of English in ways other punctuation marks cannot match.
